article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: Good attribution discipline and two defensible author-voice bias flags. However, one label is misapplied ('Slant' instead of an opinion-as-fact/spin characterization) and the model missed a couple of clear author-level word-choice instances.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text is in the author’s own prose; no quoted or attributed-source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Both items are genuine editorial/evaluative statements in the author’s voice, not neutral reportage.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed other clear author-level bias phrases like 'late Cuban despot Fidel Castro' (loaded label) and 'Breitbart’s vague and unverified claim' (subjective qualifiers).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The first item was mislabeled as 'Slant'; it better fits Opinion Statements Presented as Fact or Spin/Word Choice. The second label is appropriate.
